billing.email.boleto_overdue_intro: Your boleto for :product in the amount of :amount is overdue.
billing.email.boleto_overdue_warning: After the due date, access to resources may be suspended. Please settle your payment.
billing.email.boleto_payment_instruction: You can pay this boleto at any bank branch, lottery house, or through your internet banking.
billing.email.boleto_payment_intro: Your bank slip has been generated for :product in the amount of :amount.
billing.email.boleto_reminder_intro: Your boleto for :product is due in :days days.
billing.email.payment_confirmed_intro: Your payment for :product has been confirmed successfully.
billing.email.pix_copy_paste_instruction: Or copy and paste the code below in your banking app:
billing.email.pix_expires_warning: Warning: This PIX expires in 30 minutes. After that, you'll need to generate a new code.
billing.email.pix_payment_intro: Your PIX payment has been generated for :product in the amount of :amount.
billing.email.thanks: Thank you for using our services!
